name: phase3-on-agent-complete
description: Post-execution checklist after any Phase 3 agent task completes

action.message:
A Phase 3 agent task just completed. Verify the output:

1. No new @tool functions added to deepracer_tools.py — Phase 3 adds no new tools
2. No base64 encoding added to vision_assessor.py — boto3 Converse API takes raw bytes
3. VisionAssessor.assess() still wraps _call_nova() in try/except
4. _should_assess() still returns False for 'stop' and 'connect'
5. asyncio.wait_for still wraps assess_step() with VISION_ASSESS_TIMEOUT
6. validate_plan() still called on every vision-triggered replan
7. CameraPolicy.plan() still delegates to NovaPolicy — vision not used during planning
8. No DEEPRACER_PASSWORD in any log statement or error message
9. camera_stream.py still uses SOI/EOI markers — not multipart boundary parsing
10. /frame route still returns HTTP 200 with placeholder fallback

Report any regressions.
